query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN dteNewListing IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_dteNewListing,
  SUM(CASE WHEN dteTermination IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_dteTermination,
  SUM(CASE WHEN chrTransactionType = 'SALE' AND dteNewListing >= DATE('2026-03-01') AND dteNewListing <= DATE('2026-03-31') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as angariações_março,
  SUM(CASE WHEN chrTransactionType = 'SALE' AND dteTermination >= DATE('2026-03-01') AND dteTermination <= DATE('2026-03-31') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as baixas_março
FROM properfyProperties;

  SUM(CASE WHEN dteNewListing IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_dteNewListing,
  SUM(CASE WHEN dteTermination IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_dteTermination,
  SUM(CASE WHEN chrTransactionType = 'SALE' AND dteNewListing >= DATE('2026-03-01') AND dteNewListing <= DATE('2026-03-31') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as angariações_março,
  SUM(CASE WHEN chrTransactionType = 'SALE' AND dteTermination >= DATE('2026-03-01') AND dteTermination <= DATE('2026-03-31') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as baixas_março
FROM properfyProperties;
